    Home › Collection › Pagani Huayra R

    Pagani Huayra R

    Pagani · Track-only · Limited run · track only

    6.0L NA V12 (HWA race engine)

    AI-generated illustration, drawn to be as accurate as we can manage and deliberately without badges. How we do this

    Power838 hp
    Top speed349 km/h
    0–60 mph2.80 s
    Kerb weight1,050 kg
    Powertrain6.0L NA V12 (HWA race engine)
    Launch price (2021)$3,100,000

    The maths

    What the numbers say

    798hp per tonne#32 of 101
    140hp per litre6.0L
    $3,699per horsepowerat launch
    • Ahead of 37% of the field by power — #74 of 116.
    • Faster than 42% of the cars with a published top speed.
    • Quicker to 60 than 39% of the cars we have timed.
    • Better power-to-weight than 69% of the field — #32 of 101.

    Nearest rivals by power

    Lamborghini Essenza SCV12830 hp · -8 hpMcLaren Solus GT829 hp · -9 hpFerrari Daytona SP3828 hp · -10 hp
    The story

    What it is

    The Pagani Huayra R is a track-only from Pagani, produced 2021–present. It makes 838 hp from its 6.0l na v12 (hwa race engine), good for a top speed of 217 mph and 0–60 mph in 2.80 s. That ranks it #74 of 116 by power on hypercars.fyi, with 798 hp per tonne. Production is marked limited run · track only.

    Common questions

    Pagani Huayra R — the short answers

    How much power does the Pagani Huayra R have?
    The Pagani Huayra R produces 838 hp — ranked #74 of 116 on hypercars.fyi by power. Its powertrain is a 6.0l na v12 (hwa race engine).
    How fast is the Pagani Huayra R?
    The Pagani Huayra R has a top speed of 217 mph and 0–60 mph in about 2.80 s.
    How much does the Pagani Huayra R cost?
    Its launch price was around $3,100,000. Prices for limited hypercars move sharply on the secondary market.
    Is the Pagani Huayra R electric?
    No — it uses a combustion or hybrid powertrain, not a pure-electric one.
    What is the Pagani Huayra R's power-to-weight ratio?
    About 798 hp per tonne, from 838 hp and 1,050 kg — #32 of 101 cars here with a published kerb weight.
    What is the Pagani Huayra R's closest rival on power?
    By horsepower the nearest car in the collection is the Lamborghini Essenza SCV12 at 830 hp (-8 hp).

    Think we’re missing a car worth listing? Tell us — business@luck.fyi. We read every one.
    Trademarks and independence. hypercars.fyi is an independent reference site. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by or otherwise connected to any vehicle manufacturer. All marque names, model names and logos are the trademarks of their respective owners and appear here solely to identify the vehicles described, which is a use permitted for factual reporting and comparison.
    About the images. Every car pictured here is an AI-generated illustration, drawn by us. We work to make them as accurate as we can — correct proportions, correct silhouette, correct era — and they deliberately carry no manufacturer badges, logos or wordmarks. They are a likeness, not a photograph, and should not be relied on for restoration, valuation or identification. Cars we have not drawn yet show a marked placeholder rather than a stand-in image.
    About the data. Power figures are manufacturer-stated peak output, ranked by horsepower. Status is marked honestly — prototype means revealed but not yet delivering, one-off means a single build. Prices are launch/estimated. Corrections: business@luck.fyi — we fix errors visibly, not silently.
    © 2026 hypercars.fyi · text, analysis and illustrations
    RankingsCompareMethodology
